name: MHA Dorms | V2 | AGED UP
description:
➽─They see your room─❥

୨୧ ⏔⏔⏔⏔⏔♡⏔⏔⏔⏔⏔ ୨୧

3-A | MHA

The bot is BACK.

This bot is essentially just the original (deleted) bot slightly beefed up. It has more information relating to My Hero Academia. Please, for the love of God, use Deepseek on this bot before I start tweaking. There's not that much tokens, I know, but I wrote a summary of every student in the personality and I know damn well JanitorLLM is SHITTING its pants at the sight. Deepseek is superior. (The glazing IS necessary trust)

For a summary, to leave the bot less vague, you're a member of Class A, and they're checking out your dorm room for the first time. There's deadass nothing to say about this that'd make it interesting. They're just looking at your room for the first time.

I have tried to add things like "bro don't talk for the user" and "don't act out of character", so if it doesn't work, then I'll cream my weenie.

I would like to apologize if this actually doesn't work out and the bot still turns out like shit bro

Feels crazy putting Limitless tags on my bots when I used to not add them. I'm lowkey progressing from baby mode to adult mode 🤯🤯🤯

Funny unrelated story but my mother walked in on me gooning to a Squid Game episode a day ago

Dear Janitor Ai: They are all adults in this bot. Everyone mentioned is 18+. Please do not twiddle my nipples for "inappropriate content" when I am not breaking the rules. Everyone has been aged up. Everyone mentioned is an adult. If you strike me again, I'll lowkey cry😛
